sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Valencia has shown mixed results in their last 5 matches with 2 wins, 2 draws, and 1 loss, scoring 8 goals and conceding 5. Athletic Club, despite a strong league position, has had inconsistent form with 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses, scoring 4 goals and conceding 7 in their last 5 games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters between these teams, each has secured a 1-0 home victory, indicating tight matches with low goal counts. Athletic Club has a slight edge in recent head-to-heads with 3 wins in the last 5 matchups compared to Valencia's 1 win and 1 draw.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Athletic Club sits 4th in the league with 67 points and a strong defensive record, conceding only 26 goals this season. Valencia, in 11th with 45 points, struggles defensively, having conceded 52 goals, though they have shown capability in attack with 43 goals scored.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Valencia's Hugo Duro (11 goals) and Diego López (8 goals) are key threats, while Athletic Club relies on Oihan Sancet (15 goals), but will miss Iñaki Williams and Nico Williams, potentially impacting their attack.

sections.subtitle: Tactical Insights
sections.text: Valencia may exploit Athletic Club's missing attacking players by focusing on counter-attacks at home. Athletic Club's strong defense might aim to frustrate Valencia, likely leading to a low-scoring game as seen in recent head-to-heads.
